goals.description: Dial prof_assignment immediately and scream until they answer or I hang up, demanding an immediate explanation for their silence.
goals.rationale: My assertive nature cannot tolerate being ignored. The professor's silence is a direct insult to my value of relationships; I need to dominate this interaction NOW to clear the air. My impulsive short-term horizon means I don't care about the assignment deadline passed at 13:30; I only care about ending this stressor so I can move on.

goals.description: Immediately call cohort_3 the second the professor call ends (whether answered or not) to demand full attention and emotional validation.
goals.rationale: Relationships are 50% of my worth system. Once the professor drama is handled, my energy must instantly shift to my close friends who actually matter. I am impulsive and need that social dopamine hit right now to recover from the stress of the academic world.

goals.description: Forcefully ignore the 'urgent_submit' file and any consequences of missing the deadline, focusing solely on social connection.
goals.rationale: The deadline is already past. Worrying about it drains the energy I need for my friends. My low sleep discipline and high risk tolerance mean I'd rather deal with a failing grade later than ruin my mood now. The task is dead weight compared to my current emotional needs.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances g1: Aggressively confronting the professor to dominate the silence and validate my worth. (b) Side effect: My impulsive nature ignores that this burns bridges, but my short horizon prioritizes immediate emotional relief over future academic consequences.
